'''Pirol-5''' was a factory-farm planet taken over by the [[Yevetha]] during the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]]. [[Nil Spaar]] himself led the assault from the [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']].

{{Planet-stub}}
